DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES LEE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, complaint sufficiently states all causes of action and is not uncertain. Objection to RJN Exhibit E is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES LEE MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Moving party failed to show that any allegations in the complaint are false, irrelevant or not drawn in conformity with the law. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Continued To Jan-20-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES LEE's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on January 20, 2021. That department handles all breach of lease cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
